atoms.semantic_claim: The downstream engine-tree crate adds a workspace dependency on `ritual-metrics` so Ritual-specific metrics instrumentation in this crate can compile.

destinations.evidence: The ported crate manifest keeps only upstream metrics dependencies and omits `ritual-metrics` entirely.

The ported engine-tree sources do not import or call `ritual_metrics`; repo-wide Cargo manifest search in the port also finds no `ritual-metrics` workspace entry, so this dependency has no destination consumer.

atoms.notes: This manifest atom is a support dependency for downstream-only Ritual instrumentation present in the source repo engine-tree code but not ported into the v2.2.0 destination. Guideline remediation: accepted as intentionally absent because The downstream `ritual-metrics` dependency only supported engine-tree Ritual instrumentation that is absent from the v2.2 port; the manifest edge has no active destination consumer.
atoms.intentional_absence_rationale: The downstream `ritual-metrics` dependency only supported engine-tree Ritual instrumentation that is absent from the v2.2 port; the manifest edge has no active destination consumer.

summary: Atoms in this file are intentionally absent or mapped to active v2.2 behavior where applicable.
notes: Accounted as intentionally absent rather than missing because the destination repo lacks both the dependency declaration and the corresponding `ritual_metrics` call sites in `engine/tree`.
